summary: Distribucion PT Module Testing Complete - All 21 backend tests passed (100%), all frontend UI elements verified. Module includes: distribucion-pt CRUD, vinculos-odoo CRUD, conciliacion-odoo, product-templates search, stock-inventories filter. UNIQUE constraint on stock_inventory_odoo_id working correctly.

critical_code_review_comments: Backend: distribucion_pt.py correctly implements UNIQUE constraint on stock_inventory_odoo_id (line 58)
Backend: Validation for suma = total_producido with 0.01 tolerance (line 174)
Backend: Pydantic model uses Field(gt=0) for cantidad validation (line 20)
Backend: Conciliacion uses JOINs to get product info from odoo.product_template (lines 319-326)
Frontend: DistribucionPTPanel uses lazy loading via tab activation (RegistroForm.jsx line 857)
Frontend: All interactive elements have data-testid attributes for testing
Frontend: ProductoSelector uses debounced search (300ms delay)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Distribucion PT module fully tested. Test registro: n_corte=001 (id: 4b5ef69c-192a-4ffb-87df-35e4ef5e4fcc) has total_producido=400. Odoo products for testing: 1469 (UNICO), 2455 (ROEL). Odoo ajuste for testing: 9886 (Inventario Inicial OPOSSITE). UNIQUE constraint on vinculos verified - one ajuste can only be linked to one registro. PostgreSQL uses schema 'produccion' for app tables and 'odoo' for ODS tables.
